game: Yu-Gi-Oh! WC2011 Over the Nexus / Nexus Revival

LOB.full: THE LEGEND OF BLUE-EYES WHITE DRAGON

DRAGON'S ROAR.full: Control the duel with powerful Dragon-Type monsters!

ZOMBIE MADNESS.full: Release the power of the zombies and win the duel!

BLAZE OF DESTRUCTION.full: Burn your opponent with FIRE monsters and fiery combos!

FURY FROM THE DEEP.full: Crush your opponents with the fury of the Ocean Dragon Lord!

WARRIOR’S TRIUMPH.full: Unite your army and wage epic battles in your duels!

SPELLCASTER'S JUDGMENT.full: Magicians, Warlocks, and Sorcerers are yours to command!

INVINCIBLE FORTRESS.full: Call on the great Master of the Guard to create an unbreakable defense!

LORD OF THE STORM.full: Blow the competition away with awesome combos and the power of wind!

DINOSAUR'S RAGE.full: Unleash the true power of the dinosaurs and stomp your way to victory!

MACHINE RE-VOLT.full: The power of the Ancient Gears has been unleashed! Wreak mechanical mayhem!

SURGE OF RADIANCE.full: Engulf the sky in light, then let the surge of radiance shine your way to victory!

CURSE OF DARKNESS.full: Use DARK monsters and viruses to bind your opponent and win the duel!

RISE OF THE DRAGON LORDS.full: Revive powerful dragons and use their awesome power to claim victory!

THE DARK EMPEROR.full: Absolute power dominates the field. Behold, the advent of the emperor!

ZOMBIE WORLD.full: Anything and everything is engulfed by a field of darkness. A dreaded portal to the Zombie World has opened!

SPELLCASTER'S COMMAND.full: The power of divine magic is unleashed upon the arrival of Endymion, the King of Magicians!

WARRIORS' STRIKE.full: The attack of the proud warriors begins now! Release the true power hidden within!

MACHINA MAYHEM.full: The Machina Elite Force unite their power to control the state of the war! Why not kit yourself out with a Machina deck!

DRAGUNITY LEGION.full: The legendary dragon knights shrouded in wind descend upon the playing field! Obliterate your enemies!

LOST SANCTUARY.full: When the god of the sun, Master Hyperion unites the Agents, the lost sanctuary will rise again!

STARTER DECK.full: Gathering hopes bring forth a new horizon. Become the path of light! Synchro Summon! Dash forth, Road Warrior!

cards.name: Speed World 2
cards.effect:
Spell Cards other than "Speed Spell" Cards cannot be activated. During each player's Standby Phases, each player places 1 Speed Counter of their own on this card (up to 12 each). You can remove Speed Counters of your own and reveal 1 "Speed Spell" Card in your hand to apply the following effects.
4 Counters: Inflict 800 damage to your opponent.
7 Counters: Draw 1 card.
10 Counters: Destroy 1 card on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Soul Release
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select up to 5 cards from the Graveyard(s) and remove them from play.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Confiscation
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 7 of your Speed Counters and paying 1000 Life Points. Look at your opponent's hand, select 1 card in it and discard that card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - The Forceful Sentry
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 8 of your Speed Counters. Look at your opponent's hand. Select 1 card among them and return it to his/her Deck. The Deck is then shuffled.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Insect Imitation
cards.effect: Activate only by Tributint 1 monster when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 Insect-Type monster from your Deck whose Level is 1 higher than the Tributed monster's.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Reinforcement of the Army
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Add 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior-Type monster from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - The Warrior Returning Alive
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Add 1 Warrior-Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - A Wingbeat of Giant Dragon
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Return 1 face-up Level 5 or higher Dragon-Type monster you control to its owner's hand and destroy all Spell and Trap Cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Stamping Destruction
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters and have a face-up Dragon-Type monster on your side of the field. Destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card on the field and inflict 500 points of damage to the controller of that card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Book of Life
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 Zombie-Type monster from your Graveyard and remove from play 1 monster from your opponent's Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Diffusion Wave-Motion
cards.effect: Activate only by paying 1000 Life Points when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 Level 7 or higher Spellcaster-Type monster on your side of the field. During this turn, only the selected monster can attack and it attacks all monsters on your opponent's side of the field once each. The effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by this attack(s) are not activated.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Wild Nature's Release
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 Beast-Type or Beast-Warrior-Type monster; it gains ATK equal to its DEF until the end of this turn. Destroy the monster during the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Salvage
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Add 2 WATER monsters with an ATK of 1500 or less each in your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Dark Factory of Mass Production
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 2 Normal Monsters from your Graveyard and add them to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Monster Reincarnation
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 card from your hand to add 1 Monster Card from your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Overload Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Remove from play, from your side of the field or your Graveyard, Fusion Material Monsters that are listed on a DARK Machine-Type Fusion Monster Card, and Special Summon that 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This Special Summon is treated as a Fusion Summon.)

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tail Swipe
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up Level 5 or higher Dinosaur-Type monster on your side of the field. Select and return to the owner's hand up to 2 monsters that are either lower Level than the selected monster or face-down on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Instant Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only by paying 1000 Life Points when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This Special Summon is treated as a Fusion Summon.) It cannot attack, and is destroyed during the End Phase. Only 1 "Instant Fusion" can be activated per turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Burial from a Different Dimension
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Select up to 3 removed from play monsters and return them to their owners' Graveyards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Destiny Draw
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Discard 1 "Destiny Hero" card. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Trade-In
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 Level 8 monster from your hand to draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Swing of Memories
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your Graveyard. It is destroyed during the End Phase of this turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Fires of Doomsday
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. If you activate this card, you cannot Summon other monsters this turn. Special Summon 2 "Doomsday Tokens" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. These tokens cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon, unless it is for a DARK monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Gladiator Proving Ground
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Add 1 Level 4 or lower "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Allure of Darkness
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Draw 2 cards, then remove from play 1 DARK monster from your hand. If you don't have any DARK monsters in your hand to remove, send all cards in your hand to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Solar Recharge
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 "Lightsworn" monster from your hand to draw 2 cards from your Deck, then send the top 2 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Emergency Teleport
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower Psychic-Type monster from your hand or Deck. During the End Phase this turn, remove from play that monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Charge of the Light Brigade
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard. Add 1 Level 4 or lower "Lightsworn" monster from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - One for One
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Send 1 monster from your hand to the Graveyard to Special Summon 1 Level 1 monster from your hand or Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Forbidden Chalice
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Until the End Phase, the selected monster gains 400 ATK, but its effect is negated.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Saber Slash
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Destroy a number of face-up cards on the field equal to the number of face-up Attack Position "X-Saber" monsters you control.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Ancient Leaf
cards.effect: If you have 9000 or more Life Points, you can pay 2000 Life Points and remove 1 of your Speed Counters to draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Earthbound Whirlwind
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters while you control a face-up "Earthbound Immortal" monster. Destroy all Spell and Trap Cards your opponent controls.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Moray of Greed
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Return 2 WATER monsters from your hand to your Deck and draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Faustian Bargain
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Send 1 Special Summoned monster on either side of the field to the Graveyard and Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Normal Monster from your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Deceased Synchron
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 8 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 Level 8 or lower Synchro monster in your Extra Deck. Remove from play 1 Tuner and 1 non-Tuner monster in your Graveyard whose total Level equals to the selected monster's Level, and Special Summon it. During the End Phase of this turn, remove from play it.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tyrant Force
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 7 of your Speed Counters. This turn, any cards you control cannot be destroyed by battle or by card effects. Also, each time a card your opponent controls is destroyed by card effects, inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card destroyed.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Ignition
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 card in your Spell & Trap Card Zones, and destroy it. Then, change the battle positions of all monsters your opponent controls.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Speed Force
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. This turn, any cards you control cannot be destroyed by the effect of your opponent's Spell or Trap Card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Star Force
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Remove from play 1 face-up monster you control to select 1 face-up monster you control. The selected card you control gains ATK equal to the Level of removed from play card x 200.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Overtune
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Tribute 1 monster you control to Special Summon 1 Tuner monster from your hand with the same Level as the Tributed monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Contract with the Abyss
cards.effect: This card is used to Ritual Summon any DARK Ritual Monster. Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. You must also Tribute monsters from the field or your hand whose total Levels equal the Level of the Ritual Monster you are Ritual Summoning.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Final Countdown
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters and paying 2000 Life Points. After 20 turns have passed after you activate this card (counting the turn you activate this card as the 1st turn), you win the Duel.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Earth Chant
cards.effect: This card is used to Ritual Summon any EARTH Ritual Monster. Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. You must also Tribute monsters from the field or your hand whose total Levels equal the Level of the Ritual Monster you are attempting to Ritual Summon.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Advanced Ritual Art
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 Ritual Monster in your hand. Send Normal Monsters from your Deck to the Graveyard whose total Levels are equal to that Ritual Monster's. Ritual Summon a card with the name of the selected Ritual Monster from your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Recycling Batteries
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Add 2 Thunder-Type monsters with 1500 or less ATK from your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Psychokinesis
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters while you control a face-up Psychic-Type monster. Destroy 1 card on the field and take 1000 damage.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Telekinetic Power Well
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Special Summon any number of Level 2 or lower Psychic-Type monsters from your Graveyard. You take damage equal to the total Levels of those monsters x 300.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Rekindling
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Special Summon from your Graveyard as many FIRE monsters as possible with 200 DEF. During the End Phase, remove from play all monsters that were Special Summoned by this effect.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Swallow's Nest
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Tribute 1 face-up Winged Beast-Type monster you control to Special Summon 1 Winged Beast-Type monster from the Deck with the same Level as the Tributed monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Preparation of Rites
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Add to your hand 1 Level 7 or lower Ritual Monster Card from your Deck. Then you can add to your hand 1 Ritual Spell Card from your Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Cards of Consonance
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 Dragon-Type Tuner monster with 1000 or less ATK to draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Dawn of the Herald
cards.effect: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Herald of Perfection". Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. You must also Tribute monsters whose total Levels equal exactly 6 from the field or your hand. When "Herald of Perfection" is Ritual Summoned by this card's effect, you can remove from play this card in your Graveyard to select 1 of the monsters Tributed for that Ritual Summon, and return it from your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Scrapstorm
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up "Scrap" monster you control. Send 1 "Scrap" monster from your Deck to the Graveyard, then draw 1 card. Then, destroy the selected monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Miracle Synchro Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Remove from play, from your side of the field or your Graveyard, the Fusion Material Monsters listed on a Fusion Monster Card that lists a Synchro Monster as a Fusion Material Monster, and Special Summon that Fusion Monster from the Extra Deck. (This Special Summon is treated as a Fusion Summon.) If this Set card is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to the Graveyard, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Pot of Duality
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. Reveal the top 3 cards of your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, then shuffle the rest back into your Deck. You can only activate 1 "Pot of Duality" per turn. You cannot Special Summon a monster(s) during the turn you activate this card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tuning
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Add 1 "Synchron" Tuner monster from your Deck to your hand. Then send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Stardust Shimmer
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 5 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 Dragon-Type Synchro Monster in your Graveyard. Remove from play other monsters in your Graveyard whose total Levels equal the Level of the selected monster and Special Summon it from the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Forbidden Lance
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Until the End Phase, it loses 800 ATK but is unaffected by the effects of other Spell/Trap Cards.

cards.name: Speed World
cards.effect: Only "Speed Spell" Spell Cards can be activated. During their respective Standby Phases, each player places their own Speed Counters (up to 12 counters per player) on this card. When a player suffers damage, that player removes 1 Speed Counter for every 1000 points of damage.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Vision Wind
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Allows you to Special Summon a Level 2 or lower monster from the Graveyard. A monster Special Summoned by this effect is destroyed at the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Angel Baton
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. Draw 2 cards from your Deck and send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Gap Storm
cards.effect: Activate only when the difference between your Speed Counters and those of your opponent is 7 or more. Destroys all cards in the Spell and Trap Zones.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Shift Down
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 6 of your Speed Counters. Draw 2 cards from your Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Silver Contrails
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters. Increases the ATK of 1 face-up monster by 1000 points until the End Phase of your turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Synchro Return
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Special Summons 1 Synchro Monster that has been removed from play. A monster Special Summoned by this effect is removed from play at the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Speed Energy
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters. Increases the ATK of 1 face-up monster by 200 points x the number of your Speed Counters until the End Phase of your turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Zero Reverse
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. During the turn this card is activated, Special Summon 1 destroyed monster from the Graveyard, and place it on the field in Attack Position. The monster is Special Summoned at 0 ATK.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Dash Pilfer
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. Gain control of 1face-up Defense Position monster on your opponent's side of the field until the end of your turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Final Attack
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters when you have 5 or more counters. Doubles the ATK of 1 monster on your side of the field. The selected monster cannot attack your opponent directly and must be destroyed at the End Phase of your turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Reactor Pod
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 monster with ATK of 1000 or less on your side of the field. Inflicts damage to your opponent's Life Points equal to the amount of the selected monster's ATK.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Overboost
cards.effect: Increases your Speed Counters by 6. At the end of the turn in which this card is activated, reduce your Speed Counters to 1.

cards.name: Speed Spell - The End of the Storm
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 8 of your Speed Counters. Destroys all monsters on the field. The controller of those monsters suffers 300 points of damage for each monster destroyed and sent to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Speed Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Send Fusion Material Monsters that are listed by a Fusion Monster Card from your hand or your side of the field to the Graveyard, and Special Summon the Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This Special Summon is treated as a Fusion Summon.)

cards.name: Speed Spell - Sonic Buster
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Inflicts damage to your opponent's Life Points equal to half the ATK of 1 face-up monster on your side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Rapid Shotwing
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Increases the ATK of 1 face-up monster on your side of the field by 200 points x the number of your Speed Counters until the End Phase of your turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Accelerator Draw
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 12 or more Speed Counters, and your opponent has 5 or less Speed Counters. Draw 2 cards from your Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Summon Speeder
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Special Summon a Level 4 or lower monster. This monster cannot attack during the turn it is Special Summoned.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Power Baton
cards.effect: Activate only during the Damage Step when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 Monster Card from your Deck and send it to the Graveyard. Until the end of the Damage Step, the ATK of 1 monster on your side of the field is increased by half the ATK of the sent monster. You cannot draw a card on your next turn.

cards.name: Slip Stream
cards.effect: Activate only when your Speed Counters are less than those of your opponent. During the Standby Phase of your next turn, increases your Speed Counters to a number equal to that of your opponent's counters.

cards.name: Speed Booster
cards.effect:
The following effects are activated when your Speed Counters exceed those of your opponent:
 Opponent's Turn: Once per turn, you can negate the attack of 1 opponent monster.
 Your Turn: Once per turn, inflict damage to your opponent the difference of the number of Speed Counters between both players x100.

cards.name: Acceleration Zone
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent activates an "Speed Spell" Spell Card, Increases your Speed Counters by 6.

cards.name: Des Accelerator
cards.effect: Activate only when you suffer Battle Damage from an opponent's monster. Increases your Speed Counters by 1 for every 300 points of Battle Damage to your Life Points.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Speed Jammer
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Removes 6 of your opponent's Speed Counters.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Acceleration Limiter
cards.effect: During your opponent's next 2 turns, your opponent cannot place Speed Counters during his/her Standby Phases.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Slowdown Machine
cards.effect: During the turn this card is activated, remove 1 of your opponent's Speed Counters for every 300 points of damage inflicted to your opponent.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Wheelie Breaker
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 6 of your Speed Counters. Destroy all the face-up monsters on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Raigeki
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 12 of your Speed Counters. Destroy all monsters on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tremendous Fire
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 1 or more Speed Counters. Inflict 1000 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points, and 500 points of damage to your own.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Harpie's Feather Duster
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 12 of your Speed Counters. Destroy all of your opponent's Spell and Trap Cards on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Brain Control
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 6 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. Take control of it until the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Mind Control
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters when you have 6 or more counters. Take control of 1 monster on your opponent's side of the field until the End Phase. This monster cannot declare an attack or be Tributed.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Scapegoat
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 of your Speed Counters. If you activate this card, you cannot Normal Summon, Flip Summon or Special Summon during this turn. Special Summon 4 "Sheep Tokens" (Beast-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position to your side of the field. The "Sheep Tokens" cannot be used as a Tribute for a Tribute Summon (or Set).

cards.name: Speed Spell - Card Destruction
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 5 Speed Counters. Each player discards their hand and draws the same number of cards they discarded.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Fissure
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. Destroys 1 face-up monster with the lowest ATK on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Monster Reborn
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 10 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 monster from either you or your opponent's Graveyard. Special Summon the selected monster on your side of the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tribute to The Doomed
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 card from your hand to select 1 monster on the field and destroy it.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Last Will
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 5 of your Speed Counters. If a monster on your side of the field was sent to your Graveyard this turn, you can Special Summon 1 monster with an ATK of 1500 points or less from your Deck once during this turn. Then shuffle your Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Heavy Storm
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 6 of your Speed Counters. Destroy all Spell and Trap Cards on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Upstart Goblin
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Draw 1 card from your Deck. Increase your opponent's Life Points by 1000 Life Points.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Final Destiny
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 1 or more Speed Counters. Discard 5 cards from your hand to destroy all cards on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Delinquent Duo
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 8 of your Speed Counters and paying 1000 Life Points. Your opponent randomly selects and discards 1 card from his/her hand and then selects and discards another card from his/her hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Mystical Space Typhoon
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 Speed Counters. Destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Giant Trunade
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 4 Speed Counters. Return all Spell and Trap Cards on the field to their owners' hands.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Painful Choice
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 12 Speed Counters. Select 5 cards from your Deck and show them to your opponent. Your opponent chooses 1 card from your selection. Add that card to your hand and discard the remaining cards to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Nobleman of Crossout
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Destroy 1 face-down monster and remove it from play. If the monster is a Flip Effect Monster, both players must remove from play all monsters from their Decks with the same name as the destroyed monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Nobleman of Extermination
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Destroy and remove from play 1 face-down Spell or Trap Card. If it was a Trap Card, both players must remove from play all cards in their Deck with the same name as the destroyed card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - The Shallow Grave
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Each player selects a monster in their Graveyard and Special Summons it in face-down Defense Position.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Riryoku
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Halve the ATK of 1 face-up monster and add the halved amount to the ATK of another face-up monster, until the end of this turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Soul Exchange
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 monster your opponent controls. This turn you can Tribute that monster as if you controlled it. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - De-Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Return 1 Fusion Monster on the field to the Extra Deck. If all the Fusion Material Monsters that were used for the Fusion Summon of the returned monster are in your Graveyard, you can Special Summon them.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Cold Wave
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters when you have 6 or more Speed Counters at the start of Main Phase 1. You and your opponent cannot use the effect of, activate, or set any Spell or Trap Cards until your next Draw Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Limiter Removal
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 6 of your Speed Counters. Double the ATK of all face-up Machine-Type monsters on your side of the field, until the end of this turn. During the End Phase, destroy all monsters that were affected by this effect.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Creature Swap
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Each player selects 1 monster they control and switches control of those monsters with each other. Those monsters cannot change their battle positions for the rest of this turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Mystic Box
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 monster on each side of the field. Destroy the selected opponent's monster and shift control of your selected monster to your opponent.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Offerings to the Doomed
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Destroy 1 face-up monster. Skip your next Draw Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Foolish Burial
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 monster from your Deck and send it to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Bait Doll
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Force the activation of 1 face-down Trap Card. If the timing of the activation of the Trap Card is incorrect, negate the effect and destroy it. If it is not a Trap Card, it is returned to its original position. After this card is activated, it is placed into the Deck (not the Graveyard). The Deck is then shuffled.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Shrink
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. The original ATK of that monster is halved until the end of this turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Book of Moon
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Flip 1 face-up monster on the field into face-down Defense Position.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Enemy Controller
cards.effect:
Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. You can activate 1 of the following effects:
Change the Battle Position of 1 face-up monster your opponent controls.
Tribute 1 monster. Select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. Take control of it until the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Metamorphosis
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 8 of your Speed Counters and Tributing 1 monster. Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck with the same Level as the Tributed monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Dark Core
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 card from your hand to remove from play 1 face-up monster.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Fiend's Sanctuary
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters. Special Summon 1 "Metal Fiend Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). It cannot attack. When this Token battles, the opponent takes any Battle Damage its controller would have taken. Pay 1000 Life Points during each of your Standby Phases. If you do not, destroy the "Metal Fiend Token".

cards.name: Speed Spell - My Body as a Shield
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. When your opponent activates a card that has an effect which destroys 1 or more monsters on the field, pay 1500 Life Points to negate the activation of that card and destroy it.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Soul Taker
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Destroy 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. Then, your opponent gains 1000 Life Points.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Chaos End
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters and 7 or more of your cards are currently removed from play. Destroy all Monster Cards on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Reload
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 1 or more Speed Counters. Add all cards in your hand to your Deck and shuffle it. Then draw the same number of cards that you added to your Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Stray Lambs
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. If you activate this card, you cannot Normal Summon, Flip Summon or Special Summon during this turn. Special Summon 2 "Lamb Token" (Beast-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Smashing Ground
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Destroy the 1 face-up monster your opponent controls that has the highest DEF. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)

cards.name: Speed Spell - Shield Crush
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Select 1 Defense Position monster on the field and destroy it.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Special Hurricane
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy all Special Summoned monsters on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Hammer Shot
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Destroy the 1 face-up Attack Position monster that has the highest ATK. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)

cards.name: Speed Spell - Gold Sarcophagus
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Select and remove from play 1 card in your Deck. During your second Standby Phase after this card's activation, add the removed card to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Back to Square One
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Discard 1 card from your hand to return 1 monster on the field to the top of the owner's Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Miracle Fusion
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Remove from play, from your side of the field or your Graveyard, Fusion Material Monsters that are listed on an "Elemental Hero" Fusion Monster Card, and Special Summon that Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This Special Summon is treated as a Fusion Summon.)

cards.name: Speed Spell - Pot of Avarice
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Select 5 Monster Cards in your Graveyard. Return those cards to the Deck, then draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Magical Mallet
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Add any number of cards from your hand to the Deck and shuffle it. Then draw the same number of cards you added to the Deck.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Inferno Reckless Summon
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 1 of your Speed Counters when 1 monster with an ATK of 1500 points or less is Special Summoned to your side of the field while there is a face-up monster on your opponent's side of the field. Special Summon all cards with the same name as the Summoned monster from your hand, Deck, and Graveyard in face-up Attack Position. Your opponent selects 1 monster on their side of the field and Special Summons all cards with that same name from their hand, Deck, and Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Chain Strike
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 2 of your Speed Counters. Activate only as Chain Link 2 or higher; inflict 400 damage to your opponent times the Chain Link number of this card. You cannot activate this card if multiple cards/effects with the same name are in that Chain.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Ancient Rules
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters, Summon 1 Level 5 or higher Normal Monster from your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Twister
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Destroy 1 face-up Spell or Trap Card.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tornado
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters if there are 3 or more cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zone. Destroy 1 card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zone.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Double Summon
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. You can Normal Summon 1 additional time this turn. This effect can only be used once per turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Summoner's Art
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Add 1 Level 5 or higher Normal Monster from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Battle Tuned
cards.effect: Activate only by removing from play 1 Tuner monster from your Graveyard when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Target face-up monster you control gains ATK equal to the removed monster's ATK.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Curse of Fate
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up monster you control. Inflict damage to your opponent equal to half that monster's ATK. It cannot attack this turn.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Half Seize
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 3 or more Speed Counters. Halve the ATK of 1 face-up monster your opponent controls and gain Life Points equal to the ATK reduced.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Tune Up 123
cards.effect:
Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up Tuner monster you control. Roll a six-sided die and apply the following effects.
1 or 2: Increase the Level of that Tuner monster by 1.
3 or 4: Increase the Level of that Tuner monster by 2.
5 or 6: Increase the Level of that Tuner monster by 3.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Count Up
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Send any number of cards from your hand to the Graveyard and increase your Speed Counters by 3 for each card sent to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Speed Spell - High Speed Crash
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Destroy 1 card you control and 1 more card on the field.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Synchro Defuse
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 2 or more Speed Counters. Select 1 face-up Synchro Monster your opponent controls. Take control of the selected monster until the End Phase.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Speed Storm
cards.effect: Activate only when you have 4 or more Speed Counters. Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. If this card is in the Graveyard during your Standby Phase, you can remove 3 Speed Counters to add this card to your hand.

cards.name: Speed Spell - Summon Close
cards.effect: Activate only by removing 3 of your Speed Counters. Send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard and draw 1 card. Your opponent cannot Special Summon this turn.

cards.name: Speed Edge
cards.effect: During your Standby Phase, if you have more Speed Counters than your opponent, inflict the difference of the number of Speed Counters x 200. You can only control 1 "Speed Edge".

cards.name: Full Throttle
cards.effect: Increase your Speed Counter by 1 during each player's Standby Phases.

cards.name: Slowdown Trap
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent takes damage. A Speed Counter will be removed for every 1000 damage taken.

cards.name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
cards.effect: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

cards.name: Gilford the Lightning

cards.name: Winged Kuriboh
cards.effect: After this card is destroyed and sent from the field to the Graveyard, reduce any Battle Damage its controller takes this turn to 0.

cards.name: Cyber Dragon

cards.name: Cyber End Dragon
cards.effect:
"Cyber Dragon" + "Cyber Dragon" + "Cyber Dragon"
A Fusion Summon of this card can only be conducted with the above Fusion Material Monsters. During battle between this attacking card and a Defense Position monster whose DEF is lower than the ATK of this card, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Obelisk the Tormentor
cards.effect: You must Tribute 3 monsters to Normal Summon this card (you cannot Set this card). The Normal Summon of this card cannot be negated. When this card is Normal Summoned, Spells, Traps, and Effect Monster effects cannot be activated. This card cannot be targeted by the effects of Spells, Traps, or Effect Monsters. If this card is Special Summoned, it is sent to the Graveyard during the End Phase. You can Tribute 2 monsters to destroy all monsters your opponent controls. This card cannot declare an attack the turn this effect is activated.

cards.name: The Winged Dragon of Ra
cards.effect: This card cannot be Special Summoned. You must Tribute 3 monsters to Normal Summon this card (you cannot Set this card). The Normal Summon of this card cannot be negated. When this card is Normal Summoned, Spells, Traps, and other monsters' effects cannot be activated. When this card is Normal Summoned, you can pay Life Points so that you only have 100 left, to have this card gain ATK and DEF equal to the amount of Life Points paid. You can pay 1000 Life Points to select and destroy 1 monster on the field.

A Fusion Summon of this monster can only be conducted with the above Fusion Material Monsters. When a Normal Spell Card is activated, negate the effect by paying 1000 Life Points. The effect of an Effect Monster that this monster destroys as a result of battle is negated.

cards.effect: This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, while it is in the Graveyard, your opponent discards 1 random card at the end of each of their Battle Phases.

cards.name: Hidden Soldiers
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent Normal Summons or Flip Summons a monster. Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower DARK monster from your hand.

cards.name: Gil Garth
cards.effect: This steel-armored terror machine ruthlessly strikes down enemies with its giant katana.

cards.name: Coffin Seller
cards.effect: Each time a Monster Card(s) is sent to your opponent's Graveyard, inflict 300 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Malevolent Catastrophe
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent's monster declares an attack. Destroy all Spell and Trap Cards on the field.

cards.name: Question
cards.effect: When activating this card, your opponent cannot check cards in the Graveyard. Your opponent calls the name of the first monster found at the bottom of your Graveyard. If he/she calls it right, the monster is removed from play. If he/she calls it wrong, the monster is Special Summoned to your side of the field.

cards.name: Lava Golem
cards.effect: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned to your opponent's side of the field by Tributing 2 monsters they control. You cannot Normal Summon or Set the turn you Special Summon this card. This monster's controller takes 1000 damage during each of their Standby Phases.

cards.name: Relieve Monster
cards.effect: Activate only when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Select 1 monster you control, and return it to the hand. Then Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster from your hand.

cards.name: Machine Duplication
cards.effect: Select 1 face-up Machine-Type monster you control with 500 or less ATK. You can Special Summon up to 2 cards with the same name from your Deck.

cards.name: Dark Jeroid
cards.effect: When this card is Summoned, select 1 face-up monster on the field. It loses 800 ATK.

cards.name: Dragon Master Knight
cards.effect:
"Black Luster Soldier" + "Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon"
This monster cannot be Special Summoned except by Fusion Summon. This card gains 500 ATK for each other Dragon-Type monster you control.

cards.name: Five-Headed Dragon
cards.effect: The Fusion Material Monsters for this card are any 5 Dragon-Type monsters. This monster cannot be Special Summoned except by Fusion Summon. This card does not take any Battle Damage and cannot be destroyed by battle with an EARTH, WATER, FIRE, WIND, or DARK monster. (Battle Damage is still inflicted to players.)

cards.name: Queen's Knight
cards.effect: This knight catches her opponents off guard, dominating them with swift yet graceful attacks.

cards.name: X-Head Cannon
cards.effect: A monster with a mighty cannon barrel, it is able to integrate its attacks. It attacks in many ways by combining and separating with other monsters.

cards.name: Enemy Controller
cards.effect:
Select and activate 1 of these effects:
Change the Battle Position of 1 face-up monster your opponent controls.
Tribute 1 monster. Select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. Take control of it until the End Phase.

cards.name: Master Kyonshee
cards.effect: A wandering Kyonshee searching for a strong rival to defeat. They say he was known as the master of all martial arts.

cards.name: Kabazauls
cards.effect: A huge monster in the shape of a hippopotamus. The sneezing from his gigantic body is so fierce that people mistake it for a hurricane.

cards.name: Inpachi
cards.effect: A log that attacks lost travelers in the forest. Originally a big tree, it was cut down and possessed by a wicked spirit.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Spy
cards.effect: FLIP: Special Summon 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Curse
cards.effect: When this card is Summoned, inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Guard
cards.effect: FLIP: Select 1 monster your opponent controls and return it to the hand.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Spear Soldier
cards.effect: During battle between this attacking card and a Defense Position monster whose DEF is lower than the ATK of this card, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Vassal
cards.effect: The Battle Damage this card inflicts to your opponent's Life Points is treated as Effect Damage instead.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Watcher
cards.effect: When your opponent activates a card that includes an effect whereby your opponent discards from his/her hand, send this card from your hand to the Graveyard to negate the activation and the effect of the card and destroy it.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Chief
cards.effect: You can only control 1 "Gravekeeper's Chief". Cards in your Graveyard are unaffected by "Necrovalley". When this card is Tribute Summoned, you can select 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster from your Graveyard and Special Summon it.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Cannonholder
cards.effect: You can Tribute 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster, except "Gravekeeper's Cannonholder", to inflict 700 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Gravekeeper's Assailant
cards.effect: If "Necrovalley" is on the field when this card declares an attack, you can select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls and change its battle position.

cards.name: A Man with Wdjat
cards.effect: When you Normal Summon this card, and during each of your Standby Phases, select 1 Set card on your opponent's side of the field. Pick it up and look at it, then return it to its original position.

cards.name: Mystical Knight of Jackal
cards.effect: When this card destroys 1 monster on your opponent's side of the field and sends it to your opponent's Graveyard as a result of battle, you can then return the card to the top of your opponent's Deck.

cards.name: A Cat of Ill Omen
cards.effect: FLIP: Select 1 Trap Card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. If "Necrovalley" is on the field, you can add the selected Trap Card to your hand instead.

cards.name: Yomi Ship
cards.effect: When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard as a result of battle, destroy the monster that destroyed this card.

cards.name: Winged Sage Falcos
cards.effect: You can return your opponent's face-up Attack Position monster that is sent to the Graveyard by this monster as a result of battle to the top of his/her Deck.

cards.name: An Owl of Luck
cards.effect: FLIP: Select 1 Field Spell Card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. If "Necrovalley" is on the field, you can add the selected Field Spell Card to your hand instead.

cards.name: Charm of Shabti
cards.effect: Discard this card from your hand. Until the End Phase, make the Battle Damage to monsters that include "Gravekeeper's" in their card name 0.

cards.name: Cobra Jar
cards.effect: FLIP: Special Summon 1 "Poisonous Snake Token" (Reptile-Type/EARTH/Level 3/ATK 1200/DEF 1200). When the "Poisonous Snake Token" is destroyed as a result of battle, inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

cards.name: Spirit Reaper
cards.effect: This card cannot be destroyed by battle. Destroy this card when it is targeted by the effect of a Spell, Trap, or Effect Monster. If this card successfully attacks directly, your opponent randomly discards 1 card.

cards.name: Nightmare Horse
cards.effect: This card can attack your opponent's Life Points directly even if there is a monster on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Reaper on the Nightmare
cards.effect:
"Spirit Reaper" + "Nightmare Horse"
This card is not destroyed as a result of battle. Destroy this card when it is targeted by the effect of a Spell, Trap, or Effect Monster. This card can attack your opponent's Life Points directly even if there is a monster on your opponent's side of the field. If this card successfully attacks your opponent's Life Points directly, your opponent discards 1 card randomly from his/her hand.

cards.name: Card Shuffle
cards.effect: Pay 300 Life Points to use this card's effect. Shuffle either your or your opponent's Deck. You can only use this effect during your turn, once per turn.

cards.name: Reasoning
cards.effect: Your opponent declares a monster Level. Then pick up cards from the top of your Deck until a monster that can be Normal Summoned is picked up. If that monster is the same Level as the one declared by your opponent, send all picked up cards to the Graveyard. If not, Special Summon the picked up monster and send the remaining cards to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Dark Room of Nightmare
cards.effect: Each time your opponent takes damage from a card effect, except "Dark Room of Nightmare", inflict 300 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Different Dimension Capsule
cards.effect: Select 1 card from your Deck and remove it from play face-down. During your 2nd Standby Phase after activation, destroy this card and add the removed card to your hand.

cards.name: Necrovalley
cards.effect: All "Gravekeeper's" monsters gain 500 ATK and DEF. Cards in either player's Graveyard cannot be removed from play. Cards in either player's Graveyard cannot be affected by card effects, except for their own effects.

cards.name: Buster Rancher
cards.effect: Only a monster with an ATK of 1000 points or less can be equipped with this card. During damage calculation, increase the ATK of the monster equipped with this card by 2500 points if the opponent's monster that battles it is in Attack Position and its ATK is 2500 or more, OR if the opponent's monster that battles it is in Defense Position and its DEF is 2500 or more.

cards.name: Hieroglyph Lithograph
cards.effect: Pay 1000 Life Points. During the current Duel, your hand size limit becomes 7.

cards.name: Dark Snake Syndrome
cards.effect: Inflict damage to both players' Life Points during each of your Standby Phases. The first damage begins at 200 points and is doubled during each of your following Standby Phases.

cards.name: Terraforming
cards.effect: Add 1 Field Spell Card from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Banner of Courage
cards.effect: During your Battle Phase only, all face-up monsters you control gain 200 ATK.

cards.name: Metamorphosis
cards.effect: Tribute 1 monster. Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck with the same Level as the Tributed monster.

cards.name: Royal Tribute
cards.effect: Activate only while you control "Necrovalley". Both players discard all Monster Cards in their hands.

cards.name: Reversal Quiz
cards.effect: Send all cards in your hand and on your side of the field to the Graveyard. Call the type of card (Spell, Trap, or Monster) on top of your Deck. If you call it right, exchange your current Life Points with your opponent's current ones.

cards.name: Curse of Aging
cards.effect: Discard 1 card from your hand. Decrease the ATK and DEF of all monsters on your opponent's side of the field by 500 points until the end of the turn this card is activated.

cards.name: Barrel Behind the Door
cards.effect: Activate only when a card's effect that would inflict damage to you is activated. Your opponent takes the damage instead.

cards.name: Raigeki Break
cards.effect: Discard 1 card to select and destroy 1 card on the field.

cards.name: Narrow Pass
cards.effect: This card can only be activated when both players have 2 monsters or less on their respective sides of the field. Both players can only Normal Summon up to 2 additional monsters on their sides of the field.

cards.name: Disturbance Strategy
cards.effect: Your opponent adds all cards in his/her hand to the Deck and shuffles the Deck. Your opponent then draws the same number of cards that he/she added to the Deck.

cards.name: Trap of Board Eraser
cards.effect: When an effect that inflicts damage to your Life Points is activated (except Battle Damage), negate the damage to your Life Points. Your opponent then selects 1 card from his/her hand and discards it to his/her Graveyard.

cards.name: Rite of Spirit
cards.effect: Select 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster in your Graveyard and Special Summon it. This card's activation and effect are unaffected by "Necrovalley".

cards.name: Non Aggression Area
cards.effect: You can only activate this card during your Standby Phase. Discard 1 card from your hand. Your opponent cannot Normal Summon, Set and/or Special Summon during his/her next turn.

cards.name: D. Tribe
cards.effect: All monsters on your side of the field are treated as Dragon-Types until the End Phase of this turn.

cards.name: Y-Dragon Head
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can equip this card to "X-Head Cannon" you control as an Equip Card, OR unequip it to Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this effect, that monster gains 400 ATK and DEF. (A monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: XY-Dragon Cannon
cards.effect:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Y-Dragon Head"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Extra Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-up Spell or Trap Card on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Z-Metal Tank
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can equip this card to "X-Head Cannon" or "Y-Dragon Head" you control as an Equip Card, OR unequip it to Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this effect, that monster gains 600 ATK and DEF. (A monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: XYZ-Dragon Cannon
cards.effect:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Y-Dragon Head" + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Extra Deck by removing from play the above cards you control. (You do not use "Polymerization".) This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. You can discard 1 card to destroy 1 card your opponent controls.

cards.name: Soul Rope
cards.effect: Activate only by paying 1000 Life Points when a monster you control is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard. Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster from your Deck.

cards.name: King's Knight
cards.effect: When this card is Normal Summoned, if you control "Queen's Knight", you can Special Summon 1 "Jack's Knight" from your Deck.

cards.name: Jack's Knight
cards.effect: A strong master swordsman. His loyalty is to justice, his duty to protect the weak.

cards.name: Interdimensional Matter Transporter
cards.effect: Select 1 face-up monster you control and remove it from play until the End Phase of this turn.

cards.name: Goblin Zombie
cards.effect: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, send the top card of their Deck to the Graveyard. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard, add 1 Zombie-Type monster with 1200 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand.

cards.name: Drillago
cards.effect: If the only cards your opponent controls are face-up monsters with 1600 or more ATK, this monster can attack your opponent directly.

cards.name: Lekunga

cards.name: Cloning
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent Normal Summons or Flip Summons a monster. Special Summon 1 "Clone Token", with the same original Level, Type, Attribute, ATK, and DEF as the Summoned monster. When that monster is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, destroy this Token.

cards.name: Cost Down
cards.effect: Discard 1 card. Reduce the Level of all Monster Cards in your hand by 2 until the End Phase of this turn.

cards.name: Dark Blade
cards.effect: They say he is a dragon-manipulating warrior from the dark world. His attack is tremendous, using his great swords with vicious power.

cards.name: Pitch-Dark Dragon
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this card on the field, you can equip it to your "Dark Blade" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 400 points. When it attacks with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of a Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Kiryu
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this card on the field, you can equip it to your "Dark Blade" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 900 points, and you can Tribute this card to allow the equipped monster to attack your opponent's Life Points directly this turn. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Giant Orc
cards.effect: If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase. You cannot change this battle position until the end of your next turn.

cards.name: Second Goblin
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to your "Giant Orc" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, you can change the equipped monster's battle position once per turn. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Vampire Orchis
cards.effect: When this monster is Normal Summoned successfully, you can Special Summon 1 "Des Dendle" from your hand.

cards.name: Des Dendle
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to your "Vampire Orchis" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, each time the equipped monster destroys 1 of your opponent's monsters, Special Summon 1 "Wicked Plant Token" (Plant-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 800/DEF 800). (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Burning Beast
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to your "Freezing Beast" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, each time the equipped monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, destroy 1 face-up Spell or Trap Card on the field. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Freezing Beast
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to your "Burning Beast" as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, each time the equipped monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, destroy 1 face-down Spell or Trap Card on the field. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Union Rider

cards.name: D.D. Crazy Beast
cards.effect: A monster that this card destroys as a result of battle is removed from play.

cards.name: Spell Canceller
cards.effect: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, Spell Cards cannot be activated. The effects of all Spell Cards are also negated.

cards.name: Neko Mane King
cards.effect: During your opponent's turn, when this card is sent to the Graveyard by the effect of your opponent's Spell, Trap, or Monster Card, your opponent's turn ends.

cards.name: Helping Robo For Combat
cards.effect: Each time this card destroys your opponent's monster as a result of battle, draw 1 card, then select and return 1 card from your hand to the bottom of your Deck.

cards.name: Dimension Jar
cards.effect: FLIP: Both players can remove from play up to 3 monsters from their opponent's Graveyard.

cards.name: Great Phantom Thief
cards.effect: Each time this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, declare the name of 1 card. Then see your opponent's hand and discard all copies of the declared card in his/her hand to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Roulette Barrel

cards.name: Paladin of White Dragon

If this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster, destroy the monster immediately with this card's effect without flipping it face-up or applying damage calculation. You can Tribute this card to Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or your Deck. ("Blue-Eyes White Dragon" cannot attack during that turn.)

cards.name: White Dragon Ritual
cards.effect: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Paladin of White Dragon". You must also Tribute monsters whose total Levels equal 4 or more from the field or your hand.

cards.name: Frontline Base
cards.effect: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Union Monster from your hand.

cards.name: Demotion
cards.effect: Downgrade the monster equipped with this card by 2 Levels.

cards.name: Combination Attack
cards.effect: During a Battle Phase, you can use this effect on 1 monster that has attacked this turn and is equipped with a Union Monster. Change the Union Monster back to a monster in face-up Attack or Defense Position. Also, the monster that was equipped with the Union Monster may attack again this turn.

cards.name: Kaiser Colosseum
cards.effect: If there is 1 or more monster(s) on the field of the controller of this card, his/her opponent cannot place a monster on the field if his/her number of monsters would exceed the number of monsters that are on the field of this card's controller. The cards that are already on the field before this card's activation are unaffected by this effect.

cards.name: Autonomous Action Unit
cards.effect: Pay 1500 Life Points. Select 1 monster from your opponent's Graveyard, Special Summon it to your side of the field in Attack Position, and equip it with this card. When this card is removed from the field, destroy the equipped monster.

cards.name: Poison of the Old Man
cards.effect:
Select and activate 1 of the following effects:
Increase your Life Points by 1200 points.
Inflict 800 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

cards.name: Ante
cards.effect: Each Player selects 1 card from his/her hand, then looks at the Level of the selected cards. The card with more Levels returns to the hand of the player who selected it. The player who selected the card with fewer Levels takes 1000 Life Points damage and sends the card to the Graveyard. If a non-Monster Card is selected, it is treated as Level 0. If they are the same Level, each player returns his/her card to his/her hand.

cards.name: Dark Core
cards.effect: Discard 1 card. Remove from play 1 face-up monster.

cards.name: Raregold Armor
cards.effect: As long as you control the monster equipped with this card, your opponent cannot attack other monsters other than the equipped monster.

cards.name: Kishido Spirit
cards.effect: Monsters on your side of the field cannot be destroyed in a battle if the monsters' ATK are equal.

cards.name: Tribute Doll
cards.effect: Tribute 1 monster on your side of the field to activate this card. Special Summon 1 Level 7 monster that can be Normal Summoned from your hand. That monster cannot attack this turn.

cards.name: Wave-Motion Cannon
cards.effect: During your Main Phase, you can send this card to the Graveyard to inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each of your Standby Phases that have passed since this card was activated.

cards.name: Thunder of Ruler
cards.effect: You can only activate this card during your opponent's Standby Phase. Your opponent cannot conduct his/her Battle Phase this turn.

cards.name: Spell Shield Type-8
cards.effect:
Select and activate 1 of these effects:
Negate the activation and effect of a Spell Card that targets 1 monster on the field, and destroy that Spell Card.
Send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard to negate the activation and effect of a Spell Card and destroy it.

cards.name: Meteorain
cards.effect: During this turn, when your monsters attack with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of your opponent's Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points.

cards.name: Pineapple Blast
cards.effect: You can only activate this card when you Normal Summon a monster successfully. If there are more monsters on your opponent's side of the field than your side, destroy your opponent's monsters so that your opponent controls the same number of monsters as you. Your opponent selects which monsters are destroyed.

cards.name: Secret Barrel
cards.effect: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the total number of cards on your opponent's side of the field and in your opponent's hand x 200.

cards.name: Physical Double
cards.effect: You can only activate this card during your opponent's turn. Select 1 monster on your opponent's side of the field and Special Summon 1 "Mirage Token" in face-up Attack or Defense Position on your side of the field. The "Mirage Token" has the same Level, Type, Attribute, ATK, and DEF as the selected monster. Destroy the "Mirage Token" at the end of the turn.

cards.name: Rivalry of Warlords
cards.effect: When this card resolves, each player sends monsters they control to the Graveyard so that they only control 1 Type of monster. While this card is on the field, each player can only control 1 Type of monster.

cards.name: Formation Union
cards.effect:
Select and activate 1 of the following effects:
Equip 1 Union Monster on your side of the field to an appropriate monster on your side of the field as an Equip Spell Card.
Unequip 1 of your equipped Union Monsters and Special Summon it to your side of the field in face-up Attack Position.

cards.name: Adhesion Trap Hole
cards.effect: Activate only when your opponent Summons a monster(s). While that monster(s) is face-up on the field, its original ATK is halved.

cards.name: XZ-Tank Cannon
cards.effect:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Extra Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-down Spell or Trap Card on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: YZ-Tank Dragon
cards.effect:
"Y-Dragon Head" + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Extra Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-down Monster Card on your opponent's side of the field.

cards.name: Final Attack Orders
cards.effect: All face-up monsters on the field are changed to Attack Position and their battle positions cannot be changed.

cards.name: Dark Paladin
cards.effect:
"Dark Magician" + "Buster Blader"
This card cannot be Special Summoned except by Fusion Summon. While this card is face-up on the field, you can discard 1 card to negate the activation of a Spell Card and destroy it. This card gains 500 ATK for each Dragon-Type monster on the field and in either player's Graveyard.

cards.name: Double Spell
cards.effect: Discard 1 Spell Card from your hand. Select 1 Spell Card from your opponent's Graveyard and use it from the Graveyard as your Spell Card.

cards.name: Spell Absorption
cards.effect: Each time a Spell Card is activated, gain 500 Life Points immediately after it resolves.

cards.name: Diffusion Wave-Motion
cards.effect: Pay 1000 Life Points. Select 1 Level 7 or higher Spellcaster-Type monster on your side of the field. During this turn, only the selected monster can attack and it attacks all monsters on your opponent's side of the field once each. The effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by this attack(s) are not activated.

cards.name: Fiend's Sanctuary
cards.effect: Special Summon 1 "Metal Fiend Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). It cannot attack. When this Token battles, the opponent takes any Battle Damage its controller would have taken. Pay 1000 Life Points during each of your Standby Phases. If you do not, destroy the "Metal Fiend Token".

cards.name: Great Angus
cards.effect: A very violent beast, it is always berserk. People say that they have never seen it silent.

cards.name: Aitsu
cards.effect: He seems to be very unreliable, but he might have incredible potential.

cards.name: Sonic Duck
cards.effect: A duck which can walk at a sonic speed. Sometimes, he cannot deal with his incredible pace and loses control.

cards.name: Luster Dragon
cards.effect: A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.

cards.name: Amazoness Paladin
cards.effect: This card gains 100 ATK for each "Amazoness" monster you control.

cards.name: Amazoness Blowpiper
cards.effect: Select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls during each of your Standby Phases. It loses 500 ATK until the end of this turn.

cards.name: Amazoness Tiger
cards.effect: You can only control 1 "Amazoness Tiger". This card gains 400 ATK for each "Amazoness" monster you control. Your opponent cannot attack another "Amazoness" monster.

cards.name: Skilled White Magician

cards.name: Skilled Dark Magician
cards.effect: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card (max. 3). You can Tribute this card with 3 Spell Counters on it to Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your hand, Deck, or Graveyard.

cards.name: Apprentice Magician

cards.name: Old Vindictive Magician
cards.effect: FLIP: Destroy 1 monster your opponent controls.

cards.name: Breaker the Magical Warrior
cards.effect: When this card is Normal Summoned, place 1 Spell Counter on it (max. 1). This card gains 300 ATK for each Spell Counter on it. You can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card to destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card on the field.

cards.name: Magical Plant Mandragola

cards.name: Royal Magical Library
cards.effect: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card (max. 3). You can remove 3 Spell Counters from this card to draw 1 card.

cards.name: Armor Exe

cards.name: Tribe-Infecting Virus

cards.name: Des Koala

cards.name: Cliff the Trap Remover
cards.effect:
When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, you can select and activate 1 of the following effects:
Destroy 1 Spell Card or Trap Card on the field.
Send 2 cards from the top of your opponent's Deck to his/her Graveyard.

cards.name: Magical Merchant
cards.effect: FLIP: Pick up cards from the top of your Deck until you pick up a Spell or Trap Card. Add that card to your hand. Send the remaining cards to the Graveyard.

cards.name: Koitsu

While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK of the equipped monster by 3000 points. When it attacks with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of a Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

cards.name: Cat's Ear Tribe
cards.effect: The original ATK of your opponent's monster(s) that battles with this card during his/her turn becomes 200 points during the Damage Step.

cards.name: Ultimate Obedient Fiend

cards.name: Pitch-Black Power Stone

cards.name: Big Bang Shot
cards.effect: The equipped monster gains 400 ATK. When the equipped monster attacks a Defense Position monster whose DEF is lower than the equipped monster's ATK, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent. When this card is removed from the field, the equipped monster is removed from play.

cards.name: Gather Your Mind
cards.effect: Add 1 "Gather Your Mind" card from your Deck to your hand. Your Deck is then shuffled. You can only use 1 "Gather Your Mind" per turn.

cards.name: Mass Driver

cards.name: Exhausting Spell

cards.name: Hidden Book of Spell

cards.name: Disarmament

cards.effect: Remove 2 Spell Counters on your side of the field to negate the activation of a Spell Card and destroy it.

cards.name: Bowganian
cards.effect: During each of your Standby Phases, inflict 600 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Magical Stone Excavation
cards.effect: Discard 2 cards to select 1 Spell Card from your Graveyard. Add it to your hand.

cards.name: Granadora

When this card destroys a Defense Position monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, inflict damage to your opponent's Life Points equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster.

cards.name: Dark Flare Knight
cards.effect:
"Dark Magician" + "Flame Swordsman"
Any damage to this card's controller caused as a result of battle involving this monster becomes 0. When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard as a result of battle, Special Summon 1 "Mirage Knight" from your hand or Deck.

cards.name: Mirage Knight
cards.effect: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by the effect of "Dark Flare Knight". When this card battles another monster, during damage calculation increase the ATK of this card by the original ATK of the opponent's monster. During the End Phase after this card was involved in battle, remove this card from play.

cards.name: Berserk Dragon

This card can attack all monsters on your opponent's side of the field once each. Decrease the ATK of this card by 500 points during the End Phase of each of your turns.

cards.name: Exodia Necross
cards.effect: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by the effect of "Contract with Exodia". This card is not destroyed as a result of battle or by the effects of Spell or Trap Cards, and during each of your Standby Phases, increase the ATK of this card by 500 points. This card is destroyed when any of "Exodia the Forbidden One", "Right Arm of the Forbidden One", "Left Arm of the Forbidden One", "Right Leg of the Forbidden One" or "Left Leg of the Forbidden One" is not in your Graveyard.

cards.name: Battle Footballer
cards.effect: A cyborg with high defense power. Originally it was invented for a football machine.

cards.name: Arsenal Summoner
cards.effect: FLIP: Add 1 card that includes "Guardian" in its card name from your Deck to your hand. You cannot add "Celtic Guardian", "Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1", "Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #2", "Guardian of the Labyrinth", or "The Reliable Guardian".

cards.name: Acrobat Monkey
cards.effect: An autonomous monkey type robot which was developed with cutting-edge technology. It moves very acrobatically.

cards.name: Gyaku-Gire Panda
cards.effect: Increase the ATK of this card by 500 points for each monster on your opponent's side of the field. When this card attacks with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of your opponent's Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points.

cards.name: Blindly Loyal Goblin
cards.effect: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, control of this card cannot switch.
